requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 for PV Inverters — Rwanda RSB / RURA / EUCL Context
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——卢旺达RSB / RURA / EUCL背景
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——盧旺達RSB / RURA / EUCL背景

summary.en: Rwanda Standards Board (RSB) adopts IEC standards as Rwanda Standards (RS). IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment) and IEC 61000-3-2 (Limits for harmonic current emissions) are the internationally recognised EMC standards for PV inverters and are the expected evidence baseline for project procurement in Rwanda. Rwanda does not publish a single consolidated grid-code equivalent to Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1; however, RURA licensing conditions and EUCL technical connection conditions for grid-tied systems are expected to reference IEC EMC standards. For utility-scale solar projects (such as those developed under REG/EDCL and financed by development finance institutions), IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is typically required by project specifications and lender technical advisors. No standalone Rwanda-specific EMC Technical Regulation exclusively governing solar PV inverters has been confirmed; EMC requirements in practice flow from RSB compulsory standards adoption and project-level specifications referencing IEC.
summary.zh: 卢旺达标准局（RSB）将IEC标准采纳为卢旺达标准（RS）。IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（谐波电流排放限值）是光伏逆变器的国际公认EMC标准，也是卢旺达项目采购的预期证据基准。卢旺达没有发布相当于Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1的单一完整并网规范；但RURA许可条件和EUCL并网技术接入条件预计引用IEC EMC标准。对于大型公用事业太阳能项目（如REG/EDCL下开发并由开发性金融机构融资的项目），项目规格和贷款方技术顾问通常要求来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。尚未确认专门管理太阳能光伏逆变器的独立卢旺达特定EMC技术法规；实践中EMC要求来源于RSB强制性标准采纳以及项目级别引用IEC的规格文件。
summary.zht: 盧旺達標準局（RSB）將IEC標準採納為盧旺達標準（RS）。IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（諧波電流排放限值）是光伏逆變器的國際公認EMC標準，也是盧旺達項目採購的預期證據基準。盧旺達沒有發布相當於Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1的單一完整併網規範；但RURA許可條件和EUCL併網技術接入條件預計引用IEC EMC標準。對於大型公用事業太陽能項目（如REG/EDCL下開發並由開發性金融機構融資的項目），項目規格和貸款方技術顧問通常要求來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。尚未確認專門管理太陽能光伏逆變器的獨立盧旺達特定EMC技術法規；實踐中EMC要求來源於RSB強制性標準採納以及項目級別引用IEC的規格文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase)
RSB (Rwanda Standards Board) — RS standards adopted from IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 series
RURA licensing conditions — referencing IEC EMC standards for grid-tied systems

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic framework. GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While IEC 62920 and GB/T 37408 draw on similar IEC 61000-series test methodologies, GB/T 37408 EMC test scope and limits are not fully harmonised with IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for Rwanda project submissions or RSB conformity assessment.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，包含与中国国内框架相符的EMC测试要求，测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管IEC 62920和GB/T 37408均参考了相似的IEC 61000系列测试方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围和限值未与IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2完全协调。仅基于GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书，不被接受为卢旺达项目提交或RSB合格评定的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，包含與中國國內框架相符的EMC測試要求，測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管IEC 62920和GB/T 37408均參考了相似的IEC 61000系列測試方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍和限值未與IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2完全協調。僅基於GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書，不被接受為盧旺達項目提交或RSB合格評定的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements applicable in Rwanda. For project submissions to Rwanda utility-scale solar projects and EUCL grid-connection applications, exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report for the model. Where harmonic test results were obtained under Chinese grid conditions (220/380 V), consider whether retesting under Rwanda grid conditions (230/400 V, 50 Hz) is required by the project specification or EUCL connection engineer. For RSB PVoC conformity where applicable, ensure the EMC test evidence references the applicable RSB-adopted RS standard rather than solely GB/T 37408.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足卢旺达适用的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。对于卢旺达大型太阳能项目提交和EUCL并网申请，出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）该型号的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。若谐波测试结果在中国电网条件（220/380 V）下获取，应与项目规格或EUCL接入工程师确认是否需要在卢旺达电网条件（230/400 V、50 Hz）下重新测试。对于适用的RSB PVoC合格评定，须确保EMC测试证据引用适用的RSB采纳RS标准，而不仅仅是GB/T 37408。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足盧旺達適用的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。對於盧旺達大型太陽能項目提交和EUCL併網申請，出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）該型號的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。若諧波測試結果在中國電網條件（220/380 V）下取得，應與項目規格或EUCL接入工程師確認是否需要在盧旺達電網條件（230/400 V、50 Hz）下重新測試。對於適用的RSB PVoC合格評定，須確保EMC測試證據引用適用的RSB採納RS標準，而不僅僅是GB/T 37408。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for utility-scale solar project procurement specifications and EUCL grid-connection submissions in Rwanda; RSB PVoC conformity where PV inverters are on the regulated product list will reference the RSB-adopted RS equivalent of IEC 62920
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 EMC testing is a requirement for voluntary CQC/CGC certification; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements as applied in Rwanda project specifications and RSB conformity assessment. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model. Confirm with RSB (rsb.gov.rw) whether the RS-adopted equivalent standards apply under PVoC, and whether Rwanda grid voltage conditions (230/400 V) require retesting compared to results obtained under 220/380 V Chinese grid conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足卢旺达项目规格和RSB合格评定所适用的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。须从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。请向RSB（rsb.gov.rw）确认PVoC下是否适用RS采纳的对应标准，以及卢旺达电网电压条件（230/400 V）是否要求相较于中国220/380 V电网条件下的测试结果重新测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足盧旺達項目規格和RSB合格評定所適用的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。須從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。請向RSB（rsb.gov.rw）確認PVoC下是否適用RS採納的對應標準，以及盧旺達電網電壓條件（230/400 V）是否要求相較於中國220/380 V電網條件下的測試結果重新測試。
